title: Tier Tags for Flow PVP
description: Shows Flow PVP Ranks next to any players name on any Server.
body: # Tier Tags for Flow PVP --- ## Functionality: * Display the rank of any player next to their name. * Cycle which kit the rank is shown for using a hotkey or "Mod menu" settings. * Automaticly pick the shown kit based on your inventorys contents. * Show all of your own ranks using a hotkey. * Show any Players ranks with /tiertags. * Works on any Server. --- ## How to use: ### Keybinds You can set all the keybinds in your controls settings just as usual. | Keybind name | function | Category | default keybind | | :--- | :---: | :---: | ---: | | Cycle Kits | Switch, which kit the Elo/Sr is displayed for | Tier Tagger (Flow PVP) | none | | Show Stats | Opens the stats screen for yourself | Tier Tagger (Flow PVP) | none | ### Settings You can acces the settings menu through Mod Menu. | Setting | function | | :--- | ---: | | Kit: | Switch, which kit the Elo/Sr is displayed for | | Auto Pick Displayed Kit: | Automaticly switches which kit the Elo/Sr is displayed for, based on your inventorys content | ### Commands | Command | function | | :--- | ---: | | /tiertags | Lookup any players stats, match history and skin | **Statistics Screen:** ### Customize Rank Diplay You can completly customize how any players ranks get displayed. just use the nametag customization menu in the settings. --- I am also open for ideas and issue fixes, for both just create a new issue on github. (This project is unofficial and not associated with Flow PVP)
